approvedBy: Steve approved unattended Foundation sprint continuation
approvalNotes: Steve approved continuing through the Foundation sprint without babysitting; blockers block unsafe actions, not the whole sprint.
GOV-001 must use existing source-backed strategy inputs, Business Atoms, Action Router, meeting packet, and planning workflow instead of creating a new governance runtime.
No external writes, sends, provider calls, browser automation, credential mutation, Drive permission mutation, people scoring, or automatic decision/task application.
